gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف على المشهور - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (21/274)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف على المشهور - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (21/274)

parts.text: أَحْمَدُ بْنُ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ أَبِي نَصْرٍ

text: سَأَلْتُ أَبَا الْحَسَنِ الرِّضَا ( عليه السلام ) قُلْتُ لَهُ أَصْلَحَكَ اللَّهُ كَيْفَ الْمُلَاعَنَةُ قَالَ فَقَالَ يَقْعُدُ الْإِمَامُ وَ يَجْعَلُ ظَهْرَهُ إِلَى الْقِبْلَةِ وَ يَجْعَلُ الرَّجُلَ عَنْ يَمِينِهِ وَ الْمَرْأَةَ عَنْ يَسَارِهِ .

en.hubeali: Ahmad Bin Muhammad Bin Abu Nasr who said,

‘I asked Abu Al-Hassan Al-Rezaasws, I said to himasws, ‘May Allahazwj Keep youasws well! How is the cursing?’ So heasws said: ‘The Imamasws would be seated and make hisasws back towards the Qiblah, and heasws would make the man to be upon hisasws right, and the woman to be upon hisasws left (facing the Qiblah)’.
en.sarwar: 11. Ahmad ibn Muhammad from ibn abu Nasr has said the following: “I once asked al-Rida’, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, saying, ‘I pray to Allah to keep you well, how is al-Li‘an (condemnation) completed?’ He (the Imam) said, ‘The Imam sits down with his back to the al-Qiblah (al-Ka‘bah) and keeps the man on his right and the woman on his left.’”
